channel.title: Go Humble! RSS Games
channel.description: Awesome RSS Feeds about HumbleBundle games bundles!

item.title: Frosty Games Fest Showcase Bundle 2026: Made in ANZ
item.description: Refresh your collection with international games
item.content:encoded:
Grab this collection featuring 11 of the coolest games made in Australia and New Zealand, from studios like PikPok, League of Geeks, and more! Claim the Infernal Throne of Hell in the turn-based strategy game Solium Infernum, or experience the wacky and surprisingly dynamic shooter 420BLAZEIT 2: GAME OF THE YEAR -=Dank Dreams and Goated Memes=- [#wow/11 Like and Subscribe] Poggerz Edition. Play the coolest games from Australian and New Zealand developers and celebrate Frosty Games Fest from the comfort of your home!

Keys expire. Please redeem before June 26th, 2027.

Bundle ends: 2026-06-27T01:00:00 UTC
Time left: 403.0 hours / 16.79 days

item.title: Redline Racing Bundle
item.description: Breakneck speed is all you need
item.content:encoded:
Buckle up for a furiously fast collection of unique and exciting racing games with the Redline Racing Bundle! Play Assetto Corsa Competizione, the official GT World Challenge video game experience, and more. Hit curves at top speeds in Art of Rally, a stylized, top-down take on rally car racing, compete on the iconic tracks of Japan’s legendary EBISU circuit in Drift CE, or try extreme downhill freeriding in Descenders, a bike racer where mistakes have real consequences! Dominate the tracks and help support the Starlight Children’s Foundation with your purchase!

Keys expire. Please redeem before June 26th, 2027.

Bundle ends: 2026-06-27T01:00:00 UTC
Time left: 403.0 hours / 16.79 days

item.title: 2K Sports Champions Bundle
item.content:encoded:
Hit the links, the hardwood, the ring, and beyond with the 2K Sports Champions Bundle! Ball out in NBA 2K26 Standard Edition with an additional 35,000 VC to customize your experience, feel the speed of the hottest greens on Earth in PGA Tour 2K25 Standard Edition, dominate the men’s or women’s circuit in TopSpin 2K25 Grand Slam Edition, and more from 2K Sports! Pay what you want for an epic collection of the biggest sports franchises in gaming and help support Covenant House with your purchase!

Keys expire. Please redeem before June 24th, 2027.

Bundle ends: 2026-06-25T01:00:00 UTC
Time left: 355.0 hours / 14.79 days

item.title: IGN Live Bundle 2026
item.content:encoded:
Kick off IGN Live 2026 with a bundle of IGN’s top-rated video games! From famous favorites to underrated gems, this bundle has a little bit of everything—and only the good stuff. Uncover the secrets of the Oldest House and save our dimension from the evil Hiss in CONTROL Ultimate Edition, including the main game and all expansions! Hoist the colors and set sail on a swashbuckling adventure aboard a magical ghost ship in Shadow Gambit: The Cursed Crew! Befriend charming characters and solve fun mysteries while exploring the hand-drawn landscapes of TOEM: A Photo Adventure! There are even more top-rated games and IGN editor’s picks to be found in this bundle, so grab it now at the price of your choice, support Child’s Play charity with your purchase, and be sure to tune in to IGN Live 2026!

Keys expire. Please redeem before June 24th, 2027.

Bundle ends: 2026-06-25T01:30:00 UTC
Time left: 355.5 hours / 14.81 days

item.title: We Will Always Be Here: Pride Month 2026
item.content:encoded:
Celebrate Pride Month 2026 with a bundle of queer-centric and inclusive games of all genres! Battle your exes and take on surreal cooking challenges in the outrageously fun “breakup simulator” Thirsty Suitors! Save the worlds of mortals and gods by looking into the future in the gorgeous adventure game Harmony: The Fall of Reverie! Run your dream D&D-inspired tavern in a cozy fantasy world in the charming visual novel Tavern Talk! There’s even more adventure, romance, and fun to be found in this bundle, so grab it now at the price of your choosing and support the Trevor Project with your purchase!

Keys expire. All titles should be redeemed before June 6th, 2027.

Bundle ends: 2026-06-25T01:00:00 UTC
Time left: 355.0 hours / 14.79 days

item.title: 12 for $10
item.description: Great games at a great discount
item.content:encoded:
What’s better than getting a bunch of fun, exciting video games you can play for hours? Getting them at a fantastic discount! Our latest 12 for $10 bundle is exactly what it says on the tin: 12 of our favorite games for just $10. Put your hand-eye coordination and fine motor skills to the test with the famously tricky (and famously fun) platformer Super Meat Boy! Enter the pixelated world of an ’80s cop show and solve the murders at the heart of Beat Cop! Hunt down anomalies and battle swarms of enemies in the cyberpunk action-adventure Anomaly Agent! There’s a lot more fun to be had in this bundle, so grab it now for just $10, and support buildOn with your purchase!

Keys expire. All titles should be redeemed before June 19th, 2027.

Bundle ends: 2026-06-20T01:00:00 UTC
Time left: 235.0 hours / 9.79 days

item.title: Critical Hits: ARPG Bundle
item.content:encoded:
Gather your weapons, rev your engines, and prepare for your greatest adventure yet with this bundle of action-adventure RPGs! Complete a hero-less land’s backlog of quests and survive the tricky combat mechanics of RPG parody game The Last Hero of Nostalgaia! Keep your bow strung and your enemies in your sights in the dark Baba Yaga origin myth retelling Blacktail! Explore uncharted new lands in the cult-classic Greedfall! There are so many more worlds to explore and quests to discover in this action-adventure bundle, so grab it now at the price of your choosing, and support the global efforts of Whale and Dolphin Conservation with your purchase!

Keys expire. Please redeem before June 12th, 2027.

Bundle ends: 2026-06-19T01:00:35 UTC
Time left: 211.0 hours / 8.79 days

item.title: Devil May Cry: Devil Trigger Reloaded Collection 2026
item.content:encoded:
Hell is empty, and all the devils are…in this bundle! All the Devil May Cry games, that is. That’s right, we’ve got the whole Devil May Cry series for the low, low price of your choosing in one bundle! Go back to where it all started with the original stylish action of Devil May Cry. Play the sequel and the prequel included in the Devil May Cry HD Collection of the first three games. Follow Dante and his new buddy Nero as they battle the demons and monsters of the Special Edition of Devil May Cry 4 and Devil May Cry 5 + Vergil Pack.

The ultimate Devil May Cry experience for the price of your choice, and every descent into the inferno supports the good folks at Breakthrough T1D charity!

Keys expire. Please redeem before December 24th, 2026.

Bundle ends: 2026-06-25T01:00:00 UTC
Time left: 355.0 hours / 14.79 days

item.title: Awesome Automation
item.content:encoded:
Sit back, relax, and let these games do all the work for you—well, almost all the work. You get to do the fun part! From fantasy stories to farming simulators, these games run on automation while you call the shots! Let your imagination run wild while you build machines to fight monsters in the engineering roguelike Rogue Voltage! Build the farm of your dreams, harvest delicious crops, raise adorable animals, and hire help to automate all the work in MR FARMBOY! Take care of colorful, adorable Morps and build your coziest bases in Time to Morp! There are even more ways to have fun with automation in this bundle, so grab it now at the price of your choice and support Farm Link with your purchase!

Keys expire. Please redeem before June 17th, 2027.

Bundle ends: 2026-06-18T01:00:00 UTC
Time left: 187.0 hours / 7.79 days

item.title: 4X: Xplore, Xpand, Xploit, Xterminate
item.description: Your rise to greatness will be documented
item.content:encoded:
Explore dynamic maps, expand your territory, exploit the environment for resources, and exterminate anything that interferes with a massive collection of 4X games! Lead armies and rise to greatness in Songs of Silence, a visually stunning adventure filled with intense battles and captivating stories, build an unrivaled empire and flex your galactic greatness in pure 64-bit awesomeness with Distant Worlds 2, and more! Pay what you want for epic 4X fun and help support Direct Relief with your purchase!

Keys Expire. Please redeem before June 12th, 2027.

Bundle ends: 2026-06-13T01:00:00 UTC
Time left: 67.0 hours / 2.79 days

item.title: Warhammer Skulls 2026 Bundle
item.description: Celebrate ten years of Warhammer Skulls
item.content:encoded:
If you’re one of the lucky Space Marines gearing up for this year’s Warhammer Skulls festival—the tenth annual celebration!—we have a real treat for you. Build out your Warhammer 40,000 library with a bundle of strategy, shooter, and RPG games that will make the 41st millennium feel closer than ever! Build up your army and evolve your weapons arsenal in Warhammer 40,000: Battlesector! Brave the hordes of the Caligari Sector and carry out the Emperor’s will in Warhammer 40,000: Inquisitor - Martyr! Join the Ork forces and master the skies in Warhammer 40,000: Dakka Squadron - Flyboyz Edition! There’s even more fun to be had in this seven-game bundle, so grab it now before your enemies can take it, and support Comic Relief with your purchase at the price of your choosing!

Keys expire. Please redeem your keys before Jun 5th, 2027.

Bundle ends: 2026-06-12T01:00:00 UTC
Time left: 43.0 hours / 1.79 days

item.title: Double Shift: Simulation Bundle
item.content:encoded:
Love simulator games but feel like you’ve exhausted all your options? We guarantee you’ll find something to love in this bundle of sim games of all types! Take on the rustic country living in the near-endless open world of Farmer’s Life! Build your own hype house and influence your way to fame and fortune in Youtubers Life and Youtubers Life 2! Tune up your dream cars and hit the streets in the racing sim game Underground Garage! There’s so much more to explore and enjoy in this bundle, so grab it now at the price of your choice, and choose which charity to support with your purchase!

Keys expire. Please redeem before June 10th, 2027

Bundle ends: 2026-06-11T01:00:00 UTC
Time left: 19.0 hours / 0.79 days

item.title: Perplexing Puzzles
item.content:encoded:
Flex your puzzle-solving skills and bend your brain into new shapes with this bundle of the best puzzle games! Challenge your sense of reality and jump inside the instant camera photos you take in Viewfinder! Solve logic puzzles to progress through a mysterious world full of secrets in Taiji! Work as a team and solve both halves of a puzzle to escape a deadly experiment in two-player co-op Parallel Experiment! There are even more exciting puzzle games to lose yourself inside in this bundle, so don’t get stumped—grab it now at the price of your choice, and support the Trevor Project with your purchase!

Keys Expire. Please redeem Viewfinder before December 10th, 2026. All other titles before June 10th, 2027.

Bundle ends: 2026-06-11T01:00:00 UTC
Time left: 19.0 hours / 0.79 days

item.title: Build, Shuffle, Battle!
item.content:encoded:
Build, shuffle, and battle throughout an all-star collection of inventive deckbuilders! Get tactical in Wildfrost, a roguelike deckbuilder where you’ll fight to collect cards strong enough to defrost an eternal winter! Uncover the mysteries of BOOK OF HOURS, a narrative RPG with deckbuilding elements set in a fictional 1930s world filled with hidden gods. Shuffle new games into your personal collection for a price you choose, and help support the TD Foundation with your purchase.

Keys expire. Please redeem before June 3rd, 2027

Bundle ends: 2026-06-11T01:00:00 UTC
Time left: 19.0 hours / 0.79 days

item.title: Humble 15th Anniversary - Indie Icons Showcase
item.description: An anniversary present from us to you!
item.content:encoded:
Happy Anniversary to us! We’re celebrating 15 years of Humble Bundle with another extra-special bundle of our favorite indie games! Guide a cursed orphan through a demon-infested castle before your body turns to crystal in Castlevania’s spiritual successor Bloodstained: Ritual of the Night! Play an upgraded spin on an old favorite in iconic roguelike Risk of Rain Returns, where the passenger of a crashed freighter must survive on an alien planet of monsters! Climb a haunted mountain and defeat nightmares, panic, and self-doubt in Celeste! There are even more great games in this bundle we’re sure you’ll love just as much as we do, so grab them now, and support the Electronic Frontier Foundation with your purchase!

Keys expire. Please redeem before June 3rd, 2027.

Bundle ends: 2026-06-11T01:00:00 UTC
Time left: 19.0 hours / 0.79 days
